name: B MANIMEKALA
bio: Dr. B. Manimekala is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science at Christ (Deemed to be University), Yeshwanthpur Campus, Bengaluru. She has 17 years of teaching experience. She has published research articles in National and International journals. She has also presented 21 papers in National and International conferences. She has authored one book, three book chapters, and owns 2 patents. Her areas of interest are IoT, networking, machine learning, and AI.

name: Dr Gayathry S Warrier
bio: Dr. Gayathry S. Warrier is an accomplished academician with over 18 years of experience in Computer Science and Engineering, currently working as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science at CHRIST University, Bangalore. She holds a Ph.D. in Computer Science and Engineering from Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education (NICHE), Tamil Nadu. Her primary research interests include image processing, machine learning, and cybersecurity. Dr. Warrier has published 11 research papers in reputed SCI and Scopus-indexed journals, contributed to 3 book chapters in the areas of biomedical imaging and AI applications, and holds 3 published patents. She has actively participated in and presented at several national and international conferences, sharing her insights on emerging technologies. In addition to her research achievements, she has contributed to academic development through syllabus design and has served as a valuation chairperson for APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University. She is also deeply committed to mentoring students and advancing interdisciplinary research.

name: Dr Jayadurga R
bio:
Vision for the Future:
Dr. Jayadurga R envisions a world where technology serves as a powerful tool to empower communities and drive meaningful change. She firmly believes that academic research should go beyond theory to address real-world challenges and fuel social innovation. For her, education is not just about imparting knowledge but about inspiring action—nurturing students to become compassionate problem solvers and responsible global citizens who contribute positively to society.

name: Dr Kalpana P
bio: BRIEF PROFILE

Dr. Kalpana P obtained her M.Sc., M.Phil., and Ph.D. in Computer Science from Bharathidasan University, Tiruchirappalli. She has completed her MBA(HRM) from Bharathidasan University. She has also qualified in the State Eligibility Test(SET) and National Eligibility Test(NET) examinations. She is currently working as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science, CHRIST (Deemed to be University), Yeshwanthpur Campus, Bangalore, Karnataka. She has more than 24 years of teaching and 14 years of research experience in the field of Computer Science. She has published many research articles in reputed National and International Journals and Conferences. She co-authored two books, viz., "A Primer to Python Programming - Code Yourself" and Python Programming Essentials – Learn by Doing, for Computer Science readers. She also published two book chapters through Nova Science and Wiley publishers. She is an active member of IAENG, Internet Society, IAAC, CSTA, IEEE, SCRS, and ACM. She got selected as the IGEN Ambassador for the IGEN Green Day 2024, organized by The Institution of Green Engineers (IGEN), as part of the #Pledge4Green initiative
Her areas of interest include Data Structures and Algorithms, Data Mining, Big Data Analytics, Machine Learning, Cryptography and Network Security, Distributed Programming, R, and Python.

name: Dr Kavitha S
bio: Dr Kavitha,is an Associate Professor in the Department  of Computer Science at Christ (Deemed to be University), Yeshwanthpur, Bangalore. With over seventeen years of experience spanning teaching, research, and industry, she has published 30 research articles in Scopus and presented 29 papers at various conferences. She has authored one book, contributed to three book chapters, and has filed five patents.In addition to her research contributions, she has actively organized and served as a resource person for numerous workshops, faculty development programs, and seminars. She received a NPTEL STAR AWARD, PROGRAMMING DOMAIN award, ENTHUSIASTIC LEARNER from NPTEL. Worked as BOE-Chairman for Computer Science, Bangalore University(2018-19). BOS subject expert member for  various universities.  Also subject expert for BOE in various colleges.

name: Dr Kokilavani T
bio: Dr. T. KOKILAVANI is currently working as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science, CHRIST University, Bangalore, Yeshwanthpur Campus. She has 25 years of teaching experience and 14 years of research experience. She has cleared the TNSET and NET exams in Computer Science. She has given NET / SET coaching for students and faculties. She has published 20 papers in International Journals (3 Scopus Indexed) and presented 21 papers in National and International Conferences (4 Scopus Indexed). She has guided 13 M.Phil Scholars and is currently guiding 3 Ph.D. scholars. She has published 3 patents. She has authored 2 books. She has written 4 study materials for Bharathidasan University. She has served as a BOS member in 2 institutions. Currently, she is working as a research associate in 2 research projects. She has served as a resource person in various institutions.

name: Dr Rashmi S
bio: Dr. Rashmi Siddalingappa earned her Ph.D. from Bangalore University, specializing in phonetic and semantic analysis for natural language processing (NLP) using data mining techniques. She was awarded the prestigious National Post-Doctoral Fellowship (NPDF) by the Department of Science and Technology (DST) under the SERB scheme and pursued her research at the Indian Institute of Science (IISc) for 2.7 years, focusing on precision medicine for cancer. Subsequently, she moved to the United States to take up a postdoctoral research position at West Virginia University, where she contributed to projects directly funded by NASA and the National Science Foundation (NSF).

name: Dr. Deepa B G
bio: Meet Dr. Deepa B.G: A Trailblazer in Computer Science and AI Research

Dr. Deepa B.G, currently serving as an Assistant Professor at CHRIST (Deemed to be University), is a distinguished academician and researcher with over 14 years of teaching experience. With more than 25+ research publications, Scopus-indexed book chapters, and patents to her name, she is a thought leader in Machine Learning and Deep Learning, especially in healthcare diagnostics. Her notable publications in Q1 and Q2 journals, including groundbreaking work on breast cancer and melanoma skin cancer prediction, showcase her deep commitment to impactful research.

Dr. Deepa B G is also a passionate educator, guiding UG and PG projects and organizing numerous FDPs, workshops, and international conferences. She is a reviewer for reputed journals and IEEE conferences and has received accolades including the "Best Faculty" award in 2023. Her leadership extends beyond the classroom as she actively contributes to curriculum development, accreditation coordination (NAAC), alumni relations, and innovation in academic administration. As a globally certified professional in Python and Web technologies, and a core member of the Center for AI, she continues to inspire the next generation of computer scientists through her work in AI-driven healthcare, Cybersecurity, and smart systems.

name: Dr. Kannan M
bio: Dr. Kannan M. is an Assistant Professor of Computer Science at CHRIST (Deemed to be University), Bengaluru, India, with nearly six years of teaching and research experience. He earned his Ph.D. in Computer Science from Vels Institute of Science, Technology, and Advanced Studies, focusing on early disease detection using ensemble deep learning models.

Dr. Kannan has published 13 Scopus-indexed research articles, authored or co-authored 7 Scopus-indexed book chapters, and holds 3 patents related to health informatics and smart systems. His research interests span medical image analysis, electronic health data prediction, explainable AI, and IoT-based intelligent systems.

In addition to his academic contributions, he actively serves as a reviewer and committee member in reputed IEEE and international conferences. He has received accolades including the Best Paper Award and Young Researcher Award, and is committed to promoting innovation and research-led teaching in the computing sciences.

name: Dr. Krishna Presannakumar
bio: About Me

Dr. Krishna Presannakumar holds a Ph.D. in Computer Science from Mahatma Gandhi University, with her doctoral research focusing on sound signal processing. Her research interests lie at the intersection of multimodal data processing, with a particular emphasis on text and audio analysis. She is passionate about exploring the integration of linguistic and acoustic features for applications in natural language processing, speech understanding, and affective computing.

She has previously worked as a research intern at the Indian Institute of Science (IISc), Bangalore, and IIT Mandi, where she contributed to projects involving sound analytics. Dr. Presannakumar is the recipient of prestigious recognitions, including the ACM AnveshanSetu Research Fellowship (2023) and the DST ASPIRE Fellowship (2021).
Her work continues to blend theoretical models with real-world applications, aiming to bridge the gap between human communication and machine understanding through robust multimodal computing.
Research Interest - Multimodal AI, Audio Signal Processing

name: Dr. Mithun DSouza
bio: Dr. Mithun D’Souza is an accomplished academician and researcher currently serving as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science at Christ University, Bangalore. With over a decade of extensive teaching and research experience across renowned institutions, he specializes in Cloud Computing, Artificial Intelligence, Big Data Analytics, Edge Computing, Machine Learning, and Image Processing. He holds a Ph.D. in Cloud Computing from Bharathiar University, Tamil Nadu, where his doctoral research focused on energy-efficient resource management in cloud data centers. His academic qualifications also include a Master of Computer Applications (MCA) with a specialization in Computer Network Engineering and a Bachelor of Science in Electronics, Mathematics, and Computer Science.

Prior to joining Christ University, Dr. Mithun D’Souza held key academic roles at St. Joseph’s University, AIMS Institutes, PES Institute of Advanced Management Studies, St. Aloysius College (AIMIT) Mangalore, and Sir MV Government Science College, Bhadravathi. Throughout his career, he has served in diverse capacities such as Internship and Placement Coordinator, Coordinator for ICT Academy and Innovation Councils, Research Cell Coordinator, and Editorial Board Member for departmental newsletters. He has also played an active role in institutional development through student clubs, entrepreneurship cells, NAAC accreditation, and industry-academia engagement.

Dr. Mithun D’Souza is a prolific researcher, having published over 30 research papers in reputed Scopus-indexed journals, IEEE conferences, and UGC Care-listed journals. His scholarly contributions include research in hybrid deep learning models for cloud scheduling, AI-enabled healthcare diagnostics, digital HR systems, and energy optimization in smart grids. In addition to his research, he has authored two academic textbooks: Cloud Computing Unveiled – A Detailed Exploration of Paradigms, Services, and Industry Solutions (2024), and Role of Artificial Intelligence, Data Science in Real World Systems (2024). He has also contributed to innovation through multiple patent filings, including a lung cancer diagnostic system using lightweight CNN, an edge computing optimization framework using deep reinforcement learning, and a patented medical device for diabetic neuropathy detection.

His excellence in academia has been recognized through the Research Excellence Award from the Scientific International Publishing House, under the Ministry of SME, Government of India (2023). He holds lifetime professional memberships with reputed bodies such as the International Association of Engineers (IAENG), ISACA (Information Systems Audit and Control Association), the Computer Science Teachers Association (CSTA), and the Scientific Research Publishing House.

Dr. Mithun D’Souza is also widely regarded as a seasoned resource person. He has delivered invited talks and workshops on topics such as Big Data Analytics, Cloud Computing, and Digital Transformation at various institutions. He has served as a reviewer for the Springer CCIS-series conference ICAIH 2025, advisory board member for the International Conference on Advanced IT, Engineering and Management (SACAIM 2024), and paper setter, evaluator, and examiner for multiple universities including Bangalore University, Mount Carmel College(Autonomous), Surana Autonomous College, St Aloysius College (Autonomous), AIMIT Mangalore, and Kuvempu University.

His areas of interest span Cloud Computing, Big Data, Edge and Fog Computing, Deep Learning, Image Processing, Computer Networks, and Data Structures. Dr. Mithun D’Souza believes in holistic education that empowers students both technically and ethically. He is also passionate about extracurricular involvement and has actively represented his institutions in football and cricket tournaments at inter-collegiate and university levels. With a commitment to student-centered learning, academic excellence, and continuous innovation, Dr. Mithun D’Souza continues to make impactful contributions to the academic community at Christ University and beyond.

name: Dr. Praveen V P
bio: Dr. Praveen V. P.

Dr. Praveen V. P. is a dedicated statistician, academician, and research professional with over 14 years of experience in teaching, data consultancy, and research in the field of Statistics, Data Science, Inventory control and Supply chain management. He is currently serving as an Assistant Professor in Department of Statistics and Data science at CHRIST (Deemed to be University), Bangalore Yeshwanthpur campus. Dr. Praveen earned his Ph.D. in Statistics from the University of Calicut, with his research focusing on supply chain processes and inventory control models. He has published in several reputed Scopus-indexed journals, including the Infosys Science Foundation Series (Springer), Central European Journal of Operational Research, and the International Journal of Operational Research.

His academic journey includes an M.Sc. in Statistics and a B.Sc. in Mathematics. In addition to his academic commitments, Dr. Praveen has been a Data Science Consultant since 2011, supporting researchers, postgraduate students, and professionals in statistical analysis, data visualization, and interpretation across multiple disciplines. He has also taught quantitative reasoning in premier institutions and conducted training programs for competitive exams like NET, SET, GRE, CAT, and NIMCET.

Previously, he has held academic positions at NIT Calicut and VVIT Malappuram, handling both undergraduate and postgraduate courses. He is actively engaged in training programs, workshops, and national/international conferences, especially on data analysis using tools like R, SPSS, Python, and MATLAB.

His research contributions include advanced modeling in deteriorating inventory systems, ameliorating demand, trade-credit financing, and stochastic processes. Dr. Praveen is a life member of the Indian Society for Probability and Statistics (ISPS) and has qualified both SET (2013) and GATE (2015) in Mathematical Sciences.
He is deeply committed to academic excellence, interdisciplinary collaboration, and mentoring young minds in the field of data science and applied statistics.

name: Dr. Stephen R
bio: Dr. Stephen R. is an Assistant Professor of Computer Science at CHRIST University, Bangalore, India. With seven years of teaching experience and over a decade of research expertise, he has made significant contributions to the field of computing sciences. He has authored 20 research articles in national and international journals and presented more than 15 papers at various conferences. Additionally, he holds three patents in the field of the Internet of Things (IoT). He has served as a resource person at multiple institutions, sharing his knowledge and expertise in IoT, communication networks, network security, Python programming, and artificial intelligence. His research and academic endeavors continue to advance innovation in these domains.

name: Dr.Rajasekaran N
bio: Dr. N. Rajasekaran is a dedicated academician and researcher with over 15 years of teaching experience and two years of industry experience in the field of Computer Science and Information Technology. Currently serving as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science at CHRIST(Deemed to be University), Bangalore (BYC).

Dr. Rajasekaran earned his Ph.D. in Computer Science from Bharathiar University in January 2024. He holds additional qualifications including an M.Phil. in Computer Science, Master of Computer Applications (MCA), B.Ed., and BCA. His research interests span software architecture, Agile, DevOps and machine learning. He has published extensively in Scopus and Web of Science indexed journals and has contributed a book chapter on deep learning applications in agriculture.

His international academic involvement includes serving as a Guest Professor at Shangqiu Normal University, Henan Province, China for the period of 1 month from May 2024 to June 2024 where he taught Software and Communication Engineering. His professional journey includes software engineering roles at TATA Communications Ltd. and Klio-Tech Pvt. Ltd., Chennai where he was involved in enterprise portal development and internal system automation.

He has received multiple awards and appreciations including the Overall Best Placement Coordinator Award and an appreciation award for software and intranet portal development in 2023. His contributions have also earned him research seed funding and support for project proposals aimed at sustainable farming and rural development.

Dr. Rajasekaran is also an active reviewer for reputed international journals such as the Journal of Systems and Software, IJEEI, and the International Journal of Software Engineering and Knowledge Engineering. He holds a granted patent titled "Machine Learning with Data Frame for Classification of Spam Comments from YouTube."

An advocate of continuous learning and community involvement, he has delivered numerous guest lectures, training sessions, and seminars on career guidance, leadership, and software development. His enthusiasm for student empowerment is evident in his active involvement in alumni engagement, placement training, and curriculum enhancement activities.

Beyond his academic contributions, Dr. Rajasekaran holds memberships in various academic and advisory bodies and has completed certifications in DevOps and Python. His vision is to bridge academic knowledge with practical applications to foster innovation and holistic development in higher education.

name: Dr.Thontadari C
bio: Dr. Thontadari C is a computer scientist with a strong foundation in research and teaching. He received an M.Sc Computer Science Degree from Kuvempu University, Shimogga in 2010, and Ph.D in Computer Science from Kuvempu University, Shimogga in 2018. Presently, working as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science at CHRIST University's Yeshwanthpur Campus in Bangalore. In the classroom, he brings his knowledge to life, covering subjects like Operating Systems, Computer Networks, Digital Image Processing, and Pattern Recognition. His dedication extends beyond the classroom. He is a prolific researcher, having authored over 10+ articles in prestigious international journals. Furthermore, he actively contributes to the academic community by serving as a reviewer for reputable journals, ensuring the quality and advancement of research in the field.

name: J Jayapriya
bio: Dr. Jayapriya J is working as an Assistant Professor, a dynamic researcher whose interdisciplinary expertise spans cybersecurity, computational intelligence, and bioinformatics, currently leading a government-funded project while having successfully completed a major Australian research initiative. As an educator, she revolutionises traditional teaching through gamification strategies, creating immersive cybersecurity simulations and interactive bioinformatics challenges that engage students while advancing research in intelligent security systems. Published 39 papers in Scopus-indexed journals and conferences. Cleared NET and GATE exams and also served as a Resource person and Reviewer.

name: MAHALAKSHMI J
bio: Dr J.Mahalakshmi is working as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science, CHRIST (Deemed to be University)- Bangalore Yeshwanthpur Campus, Nagasandra, Karnataka, India. She has received her Ph.D in Computer Science from Alagappa University, Karaikudi, Tamilnadu in the year 2017 in the area of Data Security in Cloud Computing. She has 7 years of teaching experience at PG& UG level in the field of Computer Science. She has also Cleared the TNSET examination in the year 2016. Her research lab, collaborated with Universidad Veracruzara University, Mexico.

She also awarded with DAAD Germany Government Fellowship for short Term Research in Germany. She has organized Various National and International conferences, International Seminars for the Students. Also, she currently act as Reviewer for Various Web of Science and Scopus Journals. Apart from this, she also acts as a member in Board of Studies Committee headed by her working Institution.

Besides academics, in the administrative appointments, at Christ University from September 2023, she is appointed as the Care taking Officer of the National Cadet Corps. She is also an Alumni Board of Studies member in Government Arts college for Women, Bharathidasan University, Trichy, Tamilnadu. She has published many papers in Reputed International Journals and presented articles in the National and International Conferences and acted as chairperson for various Conferences organized at various Countries. She is also an advisory committee member of Many International conferences. Her areas of research interests include Precision
Agriculture, Algorithms, Cloud Computing, Applied Cryptography and Optimization.
Research Publications
Distinctive Achievements
Granted with the Alagappa University Research Fellowship (AURF), through Alagappa University from November 2015 – September 2017.
Granted as DAAD Fellow- A part of Postdoctoral Networking Program – Offered by Germany Government at Berlin, Germany during September 2019.
Granted with Virtual International Collaboration with Universidad Veracurzara, Mexico, September 2019.

name: Ramkumar
bio: Dr.S.Ramkumar
Associate Professor,
Department of Computer Science,
School of Sciences,
Christ(Deemed to be University) | Yeshwanthpur Campus

Dr. S. Ramkumar currently serves as an Associate Professor at Christ University, Bangalore. With 13 years of teaching experience and 12 years dedicated to research, Dr. Ramkumar has published extensively in peer-reviewed journals and conferences. His primary research interests include Bio-Signal Processing, Artificial Intelligence, Human-Computer Interaction, Brain-Computer Interfaces, and Machine Vision. Dr. Ramkumar is a member of the editorial boards and a reviewer for several SCI, SCIE, and Scopus-indexed journals, both in India and internationally. His research articles have garnered over 740+ citations from 65 publications on Scopus, 1100+ citations on Google Scholar, and 250+ citations on Web of Science (WoS). He has actively organized numerous conferences, faculty development programs, training sessions, seminars, and guest lecturers for both faculty and students. Dr. Ramkumar has also chaired sessions and delivered keynote addresses at multiple international conferences. He has provided hands-on training in MATLAB, Power BI and Tableau to students and research scholars during national seminars and conducted training programs for school teachers and students to enhance their knowledge of emerging technologies. Dr. Ramkumar has been recognized with gold, silver, and bronze medals at national and international exhibitions for his research innovations in Machine Vision and Human-Computer Interfaces. He has filed three patents and has secured funded projects from prestigious agencies such as DST and CSIR with worth of 32,00,000. As an author, Dr. Ramkumar has written several textbooks, including Java for Beginners, Problem Solving Using C and C++, Deep Learning and Basics of Internet with Web Design.

name: Shrinath Bijjargi
bio: Dr. Bijjargi Shrinath Mahadev is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Statistics and Data Science at CHRIST (Deemed to be University), Yeshwanthpur Campus, Bengaluru. He earned his Ph.D. in Statistics from Karnatak University, Dharwad, under the supervision of Senior Professor (Smt.) S. V. Bhat. His doctoral research focused on nonparametric approaches to single regressor models. Dr. Shrinath has presented his work at several national and international conferences and published multiple papers in reputed journals, reflecting his expertise in regression analysis and statistical inference.

name: Sindhu V
bio: Dr. V. Sindhu is a dedicated academician with over 13 years of experience in the field of Computer Science and Engineering. She is currently serving as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science. She holds a Ph.D. in Computer Science, and her research interests include machine learning, deep learning, and image processing. Dr. Sindhu has published 10 research papers in reputed Scopus-indexed journals and international conferences and holds 3 published patents in the domain of intelligent computing and data analytics. She has also contributed to book chapters focusing on AI-driven solutions for real-world problems. Dr. Sindhu is actively involved in curriculum development, academic coordination, and student mentoring. Her commitment to research and teaching continues to inspire innovation and interdisciplinary collaboration.

name: Smruti Dilip Dabhole
bio: Dr. Smruti Dilip Dabhole, MSc,MPhil,PhD. Completed her PhD from Karnataka State Akkamahadevi Women University Vijayapura.
She has published 8+ research articles in various journals, international conferences and book chapters.
Her area of specialization is Digital image processing and pattern recognition, Computer Vision, Artificial intelligence and Data Science.

name: Vinay M
bio: Dr. Vinay M is an accomplished academic leader, researcher, and educator with expertise in Augmented Reality, Virtual Reality, Generative AI, Cybersecurity, and Digital Transformation. As Head of the Department of Computer Science, Data Science & Statistics at CHRIST (Deemed to be University), Yeshwanthpur Campus, he drives curriculum innovation, interdisciplinary collaboration, and strategic academic development. He has successfully led an international research initiative in collaboration with an Australian Consulate , Major Research project impact of ICT on higher education and currently manages a government-funded project, reflecting strong leadership in research and institutional advancement. His scholarly work focuses on the integration of immersive technologies with AI-enhanced cybersecurity frameworks, contributing to secure and future-ready digital ecosystems. A Google Certified Trainer and champion, he actively designs and delivers cutting-edge pedagogical models that blend emerging technologies with academic rigor, preparing students and faculty for leadership in the evolving landscape of digital security and transformative education.
